classification.framework: AP Calculus Course and Exam Description, current Unit 1 topic framework

questions.prompt_html:
Describe the end behavior.

ln x on (0,∞)
questions.prompt_text: Describe the end behavior. ln x on (0,∞)

choices.label: A
choices.html: ln x = -∞ and ln x = 0
choices.text: (x→(0) with superscript (+)) is under (lim) ln x = -∞ and (x→∞) is under (lim) ln x = 0

choices.label: B
choices.html: ln x = 0 and ln x = 1
choices.text: (x→(0) with superscript (+)) is under (lim) ln x = 0 and (x→∞) is under (lim) ln x = 1

choices.label: C
choices.html: ln x = -∞ and ln x = ∞
choices.text: (x→(0) with superscript (+)) is under (lim) ln x = -∞ and (x→∞) is under (lim) ln x = ∞

choices.label: D
choices.html: ln x = 1 andln x = ∞
choices.text: (x→(0) with superscript (+)) is under (lim) ln x = 1 and (x→∞) is under (lim) ln x = ∞
